name: Undue Hardship Backup Withholding Cessation

eligibility.description: Available to payees currently subject to backup withholding due to notified underreporting who can demonstrate financial hardship and a commitment to future compliance.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Taxpayers can request the Secretary to stop backup withholding on interest and dividends if they can prove it causes undue hardship and future underreporting is unlikely.
